title: Li Auto Q3 2023 Earnings Preview and Analyst Expectations
text: Li Auto announced its third-quarter financial results on November 9, 2023. Deutsche Bank analyst Edison Yu's team expected Li Auto to report revenue of RMB 34.9 billion in the third quarter, with a gross margin of 22.9 percent and adjusted earnings of RMB 2.72 per share. The analyst consensus in a Bloomberg survey was RMB 32.6 billion, 21.9 percent and RMB 2.39, respectively. Li Auto delivered 105,108 vehicles in the third quarter, marking the first time it has seen quarterly deliveries exceed 100,000 units, up 296.28 percent year-on-year and up 21.47 percent from the second quarter. The company had previously guided for third quarter vehicle deliveries to be in the range of 100,000 to 103,000 vehicles. The analyst team expected Li Auto to post a vehicle margin of 22.5 percent in the third quarter, up 1.5 percentage points from the second quarter. The analyst team expected Li Auto's management to guide fourth-quarter deliveries to be around 120,000 units. While demand for Li Auto's premium EREV SUVs has remained robust, investor concerns about Huawei-backed Aito competition have intensified. The stock declined approximately 30% over three months preceding the report.
